assets.alt: GreenTree hit by travel slowdown, restaurant overhaul

author: The Bamboo Works
teaser:
Key Takeaways:


	GreenTree Hospitality’s hotel revenue grew 8.8% in the first quarter, though much of that was due to the addition of new hotels
	The company’s revpar fell 4.6% for the quarter, as China’s yearlong travel rebound began to lose momentum


By Doug Young
teaserText:
Key Takeaways:


	GreenTree Hospitality’s hotel revenue grew 8.8% in the first quarter, though much of that was due to the addition of new hotels
	The company’s revpar fell 4.6% for the quarter, as China’s yearlong travel rebound began to lose momentum


By Doug Young
title: GreenTree Hit By Travel Slowdown, Restaurant Overhaul

teaser: Rocket Pharmaceuticals shares fell after the FDA issued a Complete Response Letter for Kresladi, a gene therapy for severe leukocyte adhesion deficiency-I. The FDA requested additional CMC information.

title: FDA Rejects Rocket Pharmaceuticals' Gene Therapy For Rare Immune Disorder, Asks For More Data, Stock Slides
